trip_read.travel_type: short business / client trip with one workshop and one dinner meeting

why: fits a 3-day trip without checked baggage
better for keeping clothing neat for the client workshop
more practical than the backpack or weekender duffel for mixed work clothes plus toiletries and electronics
still manageable for a short trip

main_compartment: nicer shoes protected in a bag

not_needed: both pairs of shoes if space is tight
